positive: A minimalist, geometric celestial scene featuring abstract constellations forming a stylized animal silhouette (like a lunar fox or cosmic bear). The style is clean, linework-focused, and highly contrasted, reminiscent of Nordic folk art meets modern astronomical maps. The main colors are deep navy indigo, shimmering silver, and subtle matte gold accents. The composition is centralized, designed as a perfect circle or emblem, with thick, elegant, single-line vector art defining the stars and constellations. The lighting is ethereal and glowing, suggesting starlight filtering through velvet darkness. Highly print-friendly, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, dirty, grimy, photorealistic, 3d render
